title: Astonish All In 1 Powerful Cleaning Dishwasher Tablets with Salt and Rinse Aid, Pack of 42 Tablets, Lemon Fresh
features: Powerful Cleaning: Our specialist formula provides powerful deep cleaning action against even the toughest of stains, including tea, coffee and dried on food
Salt & Rinse Aid: The benefit of the practical built-in salt and rinse aid get that perfect desired streak-free finish on all your glassware and dishes
Leaves Lasting Shine: Get the gleaming lasting sparkle on all your dishware, straight from the dishwasher, providing hassle-free cleaning
Lemon Fresh Scent: Banish those unpleasant odours with the beautiful sharp Lemon Fresh scent. Fragrances your kitchen air with a pure refreshing aroma

Kind to the Environment: Suitable for all water types being even fit for use with hard water, these dishwasher tabs are phosphate free making them kinder to the environment. Plus, Astonish is proud to be cruelty free and vegan friendly
description: Product Description Get spotless dishes with Astonish All In 1 Dishwasher Tablets – the complete solution for powerful dishwashing. Each tablet contains a potent blend of detergent, salt, and rinse aid to tackle grease, stains, and dried-on food. The fresh lemon scent keeps your machine and dishes smelling clean, while added salt helps soften water and reduce limescale build-up. With 42 tablets per pack, it's the smart, convenient, and eco-conscious choice. Like all Astonish products, these tablets are vegan, cruelty-free, and proudly made in the UK. Ingredients Sodium Carbonate Peroxide, Sodium Carbonate, Dye, Alcohol, C12-18 Ethoxylated and Propoxylated (Not INCI), Cellulose, Sodium Gluconate, Amylase, Subtilisin, Sodium Citrate, Sodium Sulfonate, Parfum, Sodium Acrylic Acid/MA Copolymer, Disodium Disilicate (Not INCI) Directions Scrape off food residues from dishes, pots, and pans, and place them securely into the dishwasher. Use one tablet per wash cycle following the dishwasher manufacturer's instructions, then insert the tablet into the main compartment of the dispensing drawer, close it, and select the appropriate wash program. Manufacturer Contact Information The London Oil Refining Co Ltd, Astonish House, Unit 1, Premier Point, Staithgate Lane, Bradford, BD6 1DW. See more
